name: market-replay-trainer
description: Local US stock historical blind replay trainer for disciplined beginner practice.

scripts.check:starter: node tools/build-case-library.mjs --manifest cases/starter-classic-library.json --dry-run --strict && node tools/audit-case-coverage.mjs --manifest cases/starter-classic-library.json --strict
scripts.build:starter: node tools/build-case-library.mjs --manifest cases/starter-classic-library.json --strict && node tools/bundle-case-library.mjs --manifest cases/starter-classic-library.json --dir packages/starter-classic --out packages/case-c-bundle.json --strict && node tools/sync-starter-bundle.mjs
